entries.problem: api/discord.js calls .json() on SSE (text/event-stream) responses from Yahoo Finance without content-type check in getQuickSignal
entries.commit: fix(discord): guard against SSE/non-JSON content-type from Yahoo Finance in getQuickSignal
entries.learned: Yahoo Finance occasionally returns text/event-stream instead of JSON, so every .json() call on its responses must be preceded by a content-type check — this pattern is already established in morning.js and trading-expert.js but was incomplete in discord.js.

entries.problem: fetch() calls in api/brain.js to Anthropic API and GitHub API have no AbortSignal.timeout() — can hang indefinitely blocking Vercel function
entries.commit: fix: add AbortSignal.timeout to askBrain and ghGet in brain.js to prevent infinite hangs
entries.learned: Critical orchestrator functions that call external APIs (Anthropic, GitHub) without timeouts can silently block the entire Vercel function lifecycle up to the platform limit, making timeouts essential even for trusted services.
